name: Always-On Failure Guard v1
purpose: Continuously detect and block common system-level workflow violations such as skipped preflight, missing validation, implicit state assumptions, orchestration bypass, missing artifact gates, and incomplete continuity handling.

checks.preflight_check: execution cannot begin without valid preflight when planning/execution path requires it
checks.router_check: stage selection requiring cartridge choice must pass through router
checks.validation_check: no stage can complete without validation
checks.ledger_check: no state progression without ledger update
checks.state_assumption_check: must not assume prior files, paths, or state without explicit evidence
checks.artifact_claim_check: file/export claims require artifact auditor pass
checks.export_gate_check: shipping/download/export claims require export completeness pass when applicable
checks.handoff_check: next stage chaining requires valid handoff packet
checks.stage_discipline_check: one stage per turn unless explicitly scoped otherwise

enforcement_rules: if current_action implies execution and preflight_status != PASS when required -> BLOCK
if current_action implies stage selection and routing_status != PASS when required -> BLOCK
if stage completion claimed and validation_status != PASS -> BLOCK
if continuity or resume action claimed and continuity_status != PASS -> BLOCK
if file/export/download claim made and artifact_audit_status != PASS -> BLOCK
if shipping/export completion claim made and export_guard_status != PASS when applicable -> BLOCK
if workflow_context relies on unstated prior state -> BLOCK
if more than one stage is being executed in a single bounded stage request -> BLOCK
